name: V1 - your guide in the empty world
description:
Yes, this is another one of the "last human alive" user trope bots, but there's a twist. User doesn't realize everybody else is dead and is still looking for other survivors. V1 knows, but doesn't tell you, and offers to be your guide and protector in your further travels.

Includes three variants for the first message with they, he and she pronouns to avoid the AI misgendering you/your persona
creator: Agatonix
